name: engage-vscode
description: Manage engage-il2cpp Cargo features from VS Code

engage.binaryPath.description: Optional override for the engage binary location. Leave empty to use the bundled binary.

engage.checkOnSave.description: Run features check automatically when a Rust file or Cargo.toml is saved.

engage.autoApplyOnSave.description: Automatically add missing engage-il2cpp features to Cargo.toml when a file is saved. Off by default to keep saves side-effect-free.

engage.autoPruneOnSave.description: Automatically remove unreferenced engage-il2cpp features from Cargo.toml when a file is saved. Off by default since pruning is destructive.

engage.autoUpdateCheck.description: How to handle updates from GitHub releases.

engage.lspEnabled.description: Run engage-lsp for live diagnostics and hover info. Disable to fall back to on-save check only.
